The '''C-3 passenger liner''' was a [[Passenger liner|passenger vessel]] in use during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
They were very luxurious craft and were often spotted parked near space facilities. A fairly common sight on the spacelanes, even [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] employed a C-3 liner, the ''[[Excalibur]]'', as a personal [[Transport/Legends|transport]]. It was ambushed in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] by traitorous [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]].<ref name="TIE Fighter" /> Following the [[Battle of Artorias]] the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] used several C-3s to evacuate civilians from [[Artorias]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:C3Sketch-PCG.jpg|thumb|right|250px|C-3 passenger liner concept art for ''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
The C-3 passenger liner was created for the [[1994]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']].
